description: A farm that supplies a major food brand needs to generate an annual sustainability report covering its water usage, carbon footprint, and biodiversity practices.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the farm's total water usage for the year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the water usage data.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the farm's carbon footprint based on fuel usage, fertilizer inputs, and tillage practices.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates the total CO2 equivalent emissions.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve records of biodiversity-promoting activities, such as planting pollinator habitats or cover crops.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers the relevant practice records.

nodes.task_description: Compile all the data into a formatted sustainability report based on the food brand's template.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a complete, professional report.
